basic_details.short_information: Central Electronics Limited (CEL) has released the official Consultant Notification 2026 at Central Electronics Limited. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CEL Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 63 years with a Graduate qualification, preferably in Law/ Personnel Management/ Industrial Relations, can apply offline on or before 03-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations
qualification.details: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations. More than 20 years of experience in dealing with disciplinary cases, investigation of complaints, framing of charge sheet, interpretation of CVC/DOPT/CDA rules, presentation of departmental inquiry cases before the inquiry authority etc. Preference for training courses in administrative vigilance organized by Institute of Secretariat Training & Management, Department of Personnel & Training, Govt. of India/ Central Bureau of Investigation.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) post is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (D&AR) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates, preferably with a degree in Law, Personnel Management, or Industrial Relations. Extensive experience in disciplinary matters is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant (D&AR) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (D&AR) post is 63 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (D&AR) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Consultant (D&AR) position will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month, which is negotiable.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. All candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (D&AR) position at Central Electronics Limited is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Consultant (D&AR) post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Consultant (D&AR) post announced by Central Electronics Limited.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CEL located?
faq.answer: Central Electronics Limited (CEL) is located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 201010.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for the Consultant (D&AR) role?
faq.answer: More than 20 years of experience in dealing with disciplinary cases, investigation of complaints, framing of charge sheets, and interpretation of relevant rules is highly preferred.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) post is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.
